name: ltv-band-80-85-high
rationale: Refinance at 83% LTV. F4.HL dedicated collateral-ask generator fires; F2.AC awaiting_collateral state activated. Standard prelim path bypassed in favor of minimal-ask. Same input-shape family as D01/B06 but Group E dimensional-axis attribution.
notes: Single-event sequence. Pair with E05 for above-band coverage.
